address.address: Venkatapuram (Village), Renigunta (Mandal), Tirupati, Chittoor District India
address.map_location: Annamacharya Institute of Technology & Sciences: TIRUPATI

pos_sentences.text: The effectiveness of the placement services is good and the faculty support is given for job offers.
pos_sentences.name: Kailasa Rishi

pos_sentences.text: I like the spacious labs and library with contains internet faculity
pos_sentences.name: Vedicherla Yaswitha

pos_sentences.text: These college maintains campus cleanly. These college can maintain social interaction like disha etc..
pos_sentences.name: Anonymous

pos_sentences.text: Our college has best teaching staff and friendly faculty
pos_sentences.name: Shashank

pos_sentences.text: I like the infrastructure in our college which is best one
pos_sentences.name: Shashank

pos_sentences.text: I like the greenery atmosphere and trees which gives good look and nice environment
pos_sentences.name: Shashank

pos_sentences.text: I like the faculty support in all aspects like sports , extracurricular activities.
pos_sentences.name: Kailasa Rishi

pos_sentences.text: I like the college interface and infrastructure and garden areas and play grounds.
pos_sentences.name: Kailasa Rishi

pos_sentences.text: i like college labs consiting of computers with extrodinary wifi facility
pos_sentences.name: sashank

pos_sentences.text: i like college some strict rules like ..; No ragging , No misbehaving , No mobile using in caridors
pos_sentences.name: sashank

neg_sentences.text: Our college is far from the city but transport facility is available
neg_sentences.name: Kommera Vinay

neg_sentences.text: I didn't like the fee collection department because they pressure the student to pay the fee .If not paid they behave rudely.
neg_sentences.name: Kailasa Rishi

neg_sentences.text: Some Washrooms doors are being locked unable to use.
neg_sentences.name: Yerramsetti dheeraj

neg_sentences.text: The holidays are very less for semisters.
neg_sentences.name: Mahammed kaif

neg_sentences.text: Our college will not conduct more sports. They conduct rarely
neg_sentences.name: Shashank

neg_sentences.text: Revaluation fee 2500 is too High for a middle class student.
neg_sentences.name: Yerramsetti dheeraj

neg_sentences.text: I didn't like the security system at one time they will be very strict and at one point of time they are very careless.
neg_sentences.name: Kailasa Rishi

neg_sentences.text: Our college has less interest in conducting the extra curricular activities
neg_sentences.name: Shashank

neg_sentences.text: I dislike the canteen sometimes as it wont taste good sometimes
neg_sentences.name: Shashank

neg_sentences.text: The things I dislike is Our college conduct sport rarely
neg_sentences.name: Kommera Vinay

neg_sentences.text: Our college canteen food is little bit costly
neg_sentences.name: Kommera Vinay
